amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 71 — paragraph 8 b (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 71 — paragraph 8 b (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

8 b. National supervisory authorities shall, on an annual basis, report to the AI Office about the fines they have issued during that year, in accordance with this Article;
parliament_text: 8 b. National supervisory authorities shall, on an annual basis, report to the AI Office about the fines they have issued during that year, in accordance with this Article;
